text:
Here's why HF didn't build after you merged:

## Root Cause

The GitHub Actions workflow (`sync_to_hf.yml`) only triggers on pushes to the **`main` branch**:

```yaml
on:
  push:
    branches: [main]
```

Looking at the `main` branch, its latest commit is still `6f6ed13 Rebrand to RxPrescribe` — the recent fixes from your feature branch **never landed on main**.

## What Likely Happened

The PR had a merge conflict (as shown in the previous conversation). GitHub blocked the merge because of that

1. In patient account, after clicking AI button, there is overlap between the word Done and the word Check
2. Also in patient account, the button save address needs to be clicked twice to be able to save the address
2. All expandable buttons across the app have the blinking issue

Task completed: 1. In patient account, after clicking AI button, there is overlap between the word Done and the word Check
2. Also in patient account, the button save address needs to be clicked twice to be able to save the address
2. All expandable buttons across the app have the blinking issue
PR was merged but didn't auto sync with HF. Refer to attached image too
Again sync failed. Refer attached image

The error is clear: **HF rejected the push because `__pycache__/main.cpython-311.pyc` (a binary file) was committed to the repo.**

Let me fix this by removing it from git tracking and updating `.gitignore`.There's no root `.gitignore`. I'll create one and remove the tracked `__pycache__` file.Good — no more pyc files tracked. Now let me commit and push to trigger the sync.Now I need to merge this to `main` so the HF sync workflow triggers.The `__pycache__/main.cpython-311.pyc` is **also tracked

1. In patient account, after clicking AI button, there is overlap between the word Done and the word Check
2. Also in patient account, the button save address needs to be clicked twice to be able to save the address
3. All expandable buttons across the app have the blinking issue
4. All buttons in provider patient pharmacy driver profiles are making the app blink when clicked on them
Fix these

Task completed: 1. In patient account, after clicking AI button, there is overlap between the word Done and the word Check
2. Also in patient account, the button save address needs to be clicked twice to be able to save the address
3. All expandable buttons across the app have the blinking issue
4. All buttons in provider patient pharmacy driver profiles are making the app blink when clicked on them
Fix these

All the buttons in provider patient pharmacy driver portals are making the app blink when clicked. Also as seen in attached screenshot, there are show passwords icons turned black.
Fix all these issues
